description: CompositionPure leatherette shoulder bag in red with broad and soft shoulder straps, side straps, three separate chambers and dedicated zipperThis stylish bag is for the woman with a strong sense of style. Apt for a visit to the club, a party with friends, casual date or simply on a chilled-out shopping spree, this fashionable shoulder bag is oh-so-perfect for all ages and dresses! Stack all your essentials into it comfortably. With its superior finished look, it’s definitely a head turner.Bag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
